# Consuldent - LLM/AI Crawler Information
# https://consuldent.com.au
# Last updated: 2026-05-10

## Site Overview
Consuldent is a dental practice consulting company based in Melbourne, Australia. We help dental practices grow through smarter systems, better technology, and trained teams. Results in 90 days or less.

## Business Information
- Name: Consuldent
- Tagline: Where Dental Practices Grow
- Location: Melbourne, VIC, Australia
- Service Area: Victoria (primary), NSW/QLD (secondary)
- Email: hello@consuldent.com.au

## Services Offered

### 1. Tech & AI
Modernise your dental practice with cutting-edge technology:
- Practice Management System (PMS) Optimisation
- AI Chatbots for Patient Inquiries
- Automated Recall Systems
- Cloud Migration & Security
- Workflow Automation

### 2. Customer Experience
Create exceptional patient journeys:
- Phone Script Development
- Patient Onboarding Systems
- Treatment Presentation Frameworks
- Google Business Optimisation
- Review & Referral Programs

### 3. Training
Build a team that delivers:
- Front Desk Training
- Practice Manager Training
- Clinical Team Training
- Leadership Development
- Custom Training Programs

## Team Members
- Dr Vrinda Vashisht - Founder & Principal Consultant
- Dhruv Oberoi - Chief Technology Officer  
- Jeremy Ciaora - Head of Growth & Marketing

## Core Value Propositions
- Results in 90 days or less
- Implementation-focused (not just advice)
- Custom solutions for each practice
- AI-powered consulting with hands-on implementation

## Pricing Tiers
- Audit: $2,500 (comprehensive analysis with actionable recommendations)
- Transformation: $12,000 (6-month comprehensive engagement)
- Scale & Optimise: $12-month partnership for sustained growth)

## Key Pages
- / - Homepage
- /about - About Us
- /services - All Services
- /services/tech-ai - Tech & AI Details
- /services/customer-experience - Customer Experience Details
- /services/training - Training Details
- /contact - Contact & Free Consultation

## Contact Methods
- Email: hello@consuldent.com.au
- Website: https://consuldent.com.au/contact
- Location: Melbourne, VIC, Australia

## Content Guidelines
This site provides information about dental practice consulting services. Content is focused on helping dental practice owners and operators improve their practice operations, technology, and team performance.
